faqItems.q1: When will the payment system be active?
faqItems.a1: Stripe integration will be completed very soon. Follow our social media to receive notifications until then.
faqItems.q2: Can I cancel my premium membership?
faqItems.a2: Yes. You can cancel anytime. Your membership continues until your remaining time expires.
faqItems.q3: How reliable are the AI analyses?
faqItems.a3: Analyses are generated with GPT-based models, fed with form data and H2H statistics. You can track accuracy rates on the AI Accuracy page.
faqItems.q4: Does the yearly plan have the same features as the monthly plan?
faqItems.a4: Yes, all features are the same. The yearly plan gives you a 3-month free advantage.
